page_header.heading: Smart Tools That Automate the Parts of Your Business Eating Your Time
page_header.sub: A great website gets you found. These systems convert that traffic, qualify your leads, and keep your business running efficiently — even when you're on the tools or off the clock.

solutions.heading: Instant Quote Calculators
solutions.body_1: Let customers estimate the cost of their job directly on your website — before they even pick up the phone. They enter the job details (size, material, scope, location) and get an indicative price range in real time.
solutions.body_2: This filters out unserious enquiries, gives confident buyers a reason to reach out, and positions you as a transparent operator that respects customers' time.
items: Custom-built to your exact pricing structure
Captures lead details at the final step
Instant email notification on every submission

solutions.heading: Online Booking Systems
solutions.body_1: Let customers book consultations, site inspections, or jobs directly from your website. No phone tag. No back-and-forth emails. Just confirmed appointments landing in your calendar.
solutions.body_2: Synced with Google Calendar or your existing scheduling tool, with automatic confirmation emails sent to both you and the customer.
items: Service type and time slot selection

solutions.heading: Lead & Enquiry Dashboards
solutions.body_1: A clean, simple dashboard where every lead from your website appears in real time. See the customer's name, contact details, job description, source, and follow-up status — all in one place, without digging through emails.
items: Real-time lead feed from your website forms
Status tracking: New / In Progress / Closed
Notes and follow-up logging per lead

solutions.heading: Website Performance Reporting
solutions.body_1: Clear, visual reports that show you exactly how your website is performing — so you're never guessing whether your digital investment is working. Updated monthly and sent directly to your inbox.
items: Traffic and visitor trends over time
Source breakdown: Google, direct, social, referral

solutions.heading: Automated Lead Follow-Up
solutions.body_1: Speed matters. When a customer submits an enquiry, they may contact two or three businesses at once — and the first to respond often wins the job. Our automated follow-up sequences respond within minutes, keeping your leads warm until you can call them.

solutions.heading: Service Area Maps
solutions.body_1: An interactive map on your website showing exactly where you operate. Customers can immediately see whether you cover their suburb — reducing unqualified enquiries and building confidence in the ones that do come through.
items: Visual suburb and postcode coverage map
Supports local SEO for suburb-specific searches
Easily updated as your coverage grows

solutions.heading: Review & Reputation Systems
solutions.body_1: Google reviews are one of the most powerful trust signals for trade businesses — yet most operators only get a handful because they never ask. Our review system sends a simple, automated follow-up after every completed job, prompting satisfied customers to leave a review while the experience is fresh.
items: Google Business Profile review link generation
Review display widget for your website

bridge.heading: Solutions Work Best When the Foundation Is Right
bridge.body: These systems deliver the most value when they sit on top of a well-built, conversion-optimised trade website. If you don't have that yet — or your current site isn't performing — start with our Trade Website Design service first.
bridge.card_1_body: Custom-built websites for Queensland trades, designed to rank on Google and convert visitors into genuine enquiries.
bridge.card_2_body: Smart forms that pre-qualify your leads so every enquiry that reaches your inbox is worth your time.
bridge.card_3_body: Get found by customers searching for your trade in your area — keyword research, on-page SEO, and Google Business Profile setup.

cta_banner.eyebrow: Ready to Add Systems to Your Business?
cta_banner.heading: Tell Us What You're Trying to Solve
cta_banner.body: Not every business needs every solution. Book a free call and we'll work out which systems will have the biggest impact for your trade — and give you honest guidance on where to start.
